desc: FastAPI REST API skeleton with Pydantic v2

files.pyproject.toml:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "{{project}}"
version = "0.1.0"
requires-python = ">=3.11"
dependencies = [
    "fastapi>=0.111",
    "uvicorn[standard]>=0.30",
    "pydantic>=2",
]

[project.scripts]
serve = "{{project}}.main:serve"
files.src/{{project}}/models.py:
from pydantic import BaseModel


class Item(BaseModel):
    id: int
    name: str
